      "question": "What is the primary purpose of performing regression diagnostics?",
      "options": ["A) To build a more accurate model", "B) To select the best model parameters", "C) To identify and address potential issues with the data or model", "D) To visualize the data"],
      "correct": 2,
      "explanation": "Regression diagnostics is used to identify and address potential issues with the data or model, such as multicollinearity, outliers, and non-normality
